## my dwmconfig
<div align="left" width = "600px">

```Go
         dwm config
  -------------------------------
  wm           -> dwm
  bar          -> dwm bar
  app launcher -> dmenu
  terminal     -> st
  editor       -> neovim/emacs
  shell        -> zsh
  font         -> Jet Brains Mono NF
  
```
